zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Gresley於1155年5月5日出生在英國德比夏爾卡素 格萊斯利時，她的父親Robert de Gresley29歲，母親Basilla de Drakelow25歲。她於大約1181年與John de la Warre在英國薩默塞特布利斯林頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1195年9月5日在英國瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特享年40歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gresley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Greasley
meanings: 1  English: locative name, usually from Greasley (Notts) but possibly also from Gresley (Derbys). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2), particularly the Lancs examples.

2 Norman, English: nickname, either from Old French greslet ‘marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French greslet, gresli, grailet ‘thin, slim’. In early forms, the nickname has sometimes been confused with the place-name in (1). Compare Le Gresley in Jersey and Greslé, Grêlé in France.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Gresley was born on 5 May 1155, in Castle Gresley, Derbyshire, England, her father, Robert de Gresley, was 29 and her mother, Basilla de Drakelow, was 25. She married John de la Warre about 1181, in Brislington, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 5 September 1195, in Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Gresley est née le 5 mai 1155, à Castle Gresley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Gresley, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Basilla de Drakelow, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John de la Warre environ 1181, à Brislington, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 5 septembre 1195, à Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans.

ko.Burton on Trent St Modwen, Staffordshire: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버턴 업 트렌트
ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Gresley(이)가 1155년 5월 5일 영국 더비실르 카스틀 그레슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Gresley(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Basilla de Drakelow(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1181년 영국 서머세트 브리슬링턴에서 John de la Warre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1195년 9월 5일 영국 워윅실르 보데세르트에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Gresley nasceu em 5 de maio de 1155, em Castle Gresley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Gresley, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Basilla de Drakelow, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John de la Warre aproximadamente 1181, em Brislington, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 5 de setembro de 1195, em Beaudesert, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos.

ru.Burton on Trent St Modwen, Staffordshire: буртон упон трент, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Gresley родилась 5 мая 1155 г. в местности кастл гресли, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Gresley было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Basilla de Drakelow, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de la Warre около 1181 г. в местности брислингтон, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 5 сентября 1195 г. в местности бодесирт, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет.
